  "claim_texts": [
    "The student population is much more diverse now than it was 58 years ago when the Master Plan was written.",
    "Faculty do not reflect the increased diversity of the student population.",
    "Increasing the diversity of faculty ranks is necessary for student success.",
    "There is a need for more professional development among faculty to meet the needs of a diverse student body.",
    "Funding, understaffing, and reliance on temporary faculty are challenges facing faculty and staff today.",
    "Coordination among the state’s higher education segments is necessary for clear pathways for transfer students.",

    "The state needs to dedicate more resources to ensure competitive pay and benefits for faculty and staff."
